summary: Completed testing of APS Scheduling page refactoring. All 22 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. The page has been successfully refactored without demo mode and with new APS options.

minor.issue: DataStats model was missing fields (machines, work_centers, calendars, rules, scenarios, last_import). FIXED by adding missing fields to model.

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page Ordonnancement APS fully tested with new features: priority modes, weight sliders, solver parameters, advanced options. All working correctly.

features_verified.1_no_demo_button: PASS - No 'Charger Données Demo' button found on the page
features_verified.2_priority_modes: PASS - 3 priority modes available: due_date, material_availability, balanced
features_verified.3_balanced_mode_sliders: PASS - Balanced mode shows 3 weight sliders (Date de besoin, Disponibilité matière, Minimiser temps de setup) with values 0-100
features_verified.6_advanced_options_collapsible: PASS - Options Avancées section is collapsible
features_verified.7_ignore_constraints_checkboxes: PASS - 3 checkboxes: Ignorer les règles métier, Ignorer la disponibilité matière, Ignorer les calendriers machines
features_verified.8_api_accepts_all_options: PASS - POST /api/scheduling/calculate accepts priority_mode, due_date_weight, material_weight, setup_time_weight, ignore_rules, ignore_material, ignore_calendars, max_solver_time_seconds, optimization_gap, respect_sequence
features_verified.9_visual_constraint_indicators: PASS - Contraintes Appliquées section shows visual indicators with green checkmarks for active and strikethrough for ignored

Balanced_mode_sliders.due_date_weight: PASS - data-testid='due-date-weight' visible in balanced mode
Balanced_mode_sliders.material_weight: PASS - data-testid='material-weight' visible in balanced mode
Balanced_mode_sliders.setup_weight: PASS - data-testid='setup-weight' visible in balanced mode

bug_fixed.issue: DataStats model missing fields causing 500 error on /api/data/stats
bug_fixed.root_cause: DataStats Pydantic model defined only 4 fields but get_data_stats() function used 9 fields including last_import
bug_fixed.fix: Added missing fields to DataStats model: machines, work_centers, calendars, rules, scenarios, last_import (Optional)
